content: Indajaus was founded on 10/17/2017 and is currently the leader in Uruguay. Over the years we have positioned ourselves as one of the most prestigious brands and grow shops in Latin America.

What we do: distributors for grow shops, cannabis club wholesalers, state-owned company suppliers, sales to the self-cultivating public, leaders on social networks and online platforms (Mercado Libre).

Our values: Service vocation as the central pillar, team formed by industry professionals, multinational company policies with cared work environment, social responsibility, environmental and safety policies, annual internal evaluation with Feedback to Grow form.

What we offer: All products needed to grow cannabis, accessories and clothing, free personalized attention to take your crops to maximum standards, shopping experience focused on the client as a main partner.
Company areas: management, sales and operations, administration, marketing, logistics.
We are in Palermo, Buenos Aires, Argentina. City center zone.
Hours Monday to Friday: 11:00 - 20:00.
Hours Saturdays: 12:00 - 21:00.
Hours Sundays: 12:00 - 19:00.
AMNESIA HAZE is a Sativa-dominant genetics from Amsterdam. Effects: euphoric, cerebral, creative. High THC. One of the most requested in clubs.
AK-47 is a hybrid genetics with indica-sativa balance. Effects: body relaxation with clear mind. Medium-high THC. Easy to grow.
CRITICAL+ is an Indica-dominant genetics from Spain. Effects: intense relaxation, ideal for night. Very high THC. Mold resistant.
OG KUSH is a North American hybrid genetics, classic from the West Coast. Effects: euphoria and relaxation. Citrus and fuel flavor. High THC.
STRAWBERRY is a genetics with strawberry flavor. Effects: relaxing but not sedating. Ideal for novice users.
Granddaddy Purple: deep relaxing effect, grape flavor. Indica genetics.
Bubba Kush: earthy flavor, ideal for nighttime rest. Indica genetics.
Purple Haze: floral aroma, calming effect. Hybrid genetics.
Green Crack: sustained energy, cerebral effect. Sativa genetics.
Jack Herer: spiced aroma, mental clarity. Classic Sativa genetics.
Lemon Skunk: citrus flavor, energy with clarity. Sativa genetics.
Blue Dream: perfect balance of effects. Hybrid genetics.
Girl Scout Cookies: sweet flavor, balanced effect. Hybrid genetics.
Requirements to enter: Be over 18 years old, have valid ID and be affiliated with the club. It is also recommended to have REPROCANN certificate if you grow.
Required documents: Original ID, updated proof of residence, REPROCANN certificate or equivalent.

REPROCANN is the National Registry of the Medicinal Cannabis Program (Argentina), created by Law 27,350. Enables self-cultivation, solidarity cultivation or pharmacy access with medical prescription. The process is free and done at argentina.gob.ar/reprocann.
Private cannabis clubs are legal as long as they are registered with REPROCANN and comply with Law 27,350.
Payment methods: Cash, bank transfer, debit/credit (subject to availability).
We do not deliver. Only in-person sales at the club premises.
Yes, you can reserve genetics by calling or messaging. Contact us for more information.
For inquiries about membership, inventory or special events, contact our team via WhatsApp.
